data.text: This refactor is bigger than a safe mechanical edit in this pass. I’m writing the required DDx rationale under the bead bundle path so the orchestrator can decompose or requeue it cleanly instead of landing a risky partial hoist.

I couldn’t complete this safely in the current pass without a much heavier scripted rewrite of `ExecuteBeadWorker.Run`, so I wrote the required DDx rationale here:

[`no_changes_rationale.txt`](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-f2a366db-20260608T040659-efad19d9/.ddx/executions/20260608T040659-efad19d9/no_changes_rationale.txt)

It requests `orchestrator_action: decompose` so this can be split into a safer execution unit instead of risking a partial hoist.

No code was changed, and I did not run tests.
